case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: checked 60-150s checkoutservice metrics; mem +2.1 deviation in 90-120s suggests resource bottleneck; latency.p50 +0.9 correlates with memory pressure
Checkoutservice memory bottleneck (90-120s) likely caused latency, with currencyservice latency and emailservice memory as secondary factors.
